user.title: Smart Thermostat - Core entities
user.description: Choose the air conditioner to manage and the base sensors.

energia.title: Solar and battery
energia.description: All fields are optional: leave them empty to disable automatic surplus-solar turn-on.

data.soc_min: Minimum battery SOC to turn on
data.fv_priority: Turn-on priority (lower = first on, last off)
data.fv_stagger_minutes: Minimum gap between FV turn-ons / turn-offs
data.fv_shutoff_delay_min: Minutes below threshold before turning off
data.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: Extra hours after active window end for turn-off

data_description.fv_start_time: Outside this window the thermostat won't turn on automatically from solar.
data_description.fv_end_time: Outside this window the thermostat won't turn on automatically from solar.
data_description.fv_shutoff_enabled: When enabled, if solar production drops below current consumption for the configured delay, the AC is turned off. Turn-off follows reverse priority order (highest priority number = first to be turned off).
data_description.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: Extends the turn-off window beyond the active window end. E.g. active window ends at 16:00, extra 1h → turn-off active until 17:00.
data_description.fv_priority: Lower number = higher priority: turned on first, turned off last. Higher number = lower priority: turned on last, turned off first.

profilo.title: Regulation profile
profilo.description: Choose a preconfigured profile, or pick Custom to set every parameter manually.

data.turn_on_offset: Minimum offset to turn on from solar
data.temp_delta: Regulation offset (±) applied to the AC

data.night_turn_on_offset: Night turn-on offset above night target
data.night_shutoff_delta: Temperature tolerance above night target to consider 'in range'
data.night_shutoff_min: Minutes in range before turning off at night
data.window_delay_minutes: Minutes to wait with window open before turning off

data_description.calibration_max_offset: Limits how much the setpoint sent to the AC can be lowered to compensate for the AC's internal sensor reading cooler than the room sensor.
data_description.min_below_internal: While in an active heat band, the setpoint sent to the AC will always stay at least this much below what the AC itself is reading, so the compressor keeps cooling.
data_description.night_offset: Degrees added to the target during the night window. The displayed target is unchanged; only internal regulation uses target + offset. Set 0 to disable.
data_description.night_ac_enabled: When enabled, the AC turns on during the night window if room temp exceeds night target + turn-on offset. Independent of solar logic.
data_description.night_turn_on_offset: AC turns on at night only when room temp > night target + this value. E.g. night target 27°C, offset 1.5°C → turns on above 28.5°C.
data_description.night_shutoff_enabled: When enabled, the AC turns off during the night window if the room stays within the target range for the configured minutes. Applies regardless of how the AC was turned on.
data_description.night_shutoff_delta: The room is considered 'in range' when temp ≤ night target + this value. E.g. night target 26°C, delta 0.3°C → in range when temp ≤ 26.3°C.
data_description.night_shutoff_min: The AC turns off only after the room has stayed in range continuously for this many minutes.

notifiche.title: Voice and Telegram alerts
notifiche.description: Choose the Google devices to announce alerts on and where to send Telegram notifications.

data.tts_media_players: Google devices for the voice announcement
data.notify_targets: Notify/Telegram entities to send alerts to
data.notify_chat_ids: Telegram chat IDs (only if you have no notify entities)
data.notify_temp_change_enabled: Notify on every AC temperature change

data_description.tts_message_open: Available variables: delay (wait minutes), name (thermostat name), target (target temperature).
data_description.notify_chat_ids: One or more chat IDs separated by commas, used only if no notify entity is selected.
data_description.notify_temp_change_message: Available variables: name, old_temp, new_temp, fan_mode, room_temp, target.
data_description.door_alert_enabled: Master switch for the door alert. When disabled the two channel toggles below are ignored.
data_description.door_alert_tts: If enabled, plays the door alert on the configured Google/media_player devices.
data_description.door_alert_notify: If enabled, sends the door alert via Telegram / notify entities.
data_description.door_alert_message: Available variable: name. This only sends an alert - it never turns off the AC.

abort.already_configured: This air conditioner is already managed by another Smart Thermostat instance.

data.soc_min: Minimum battery SOC to turn on
data.fv_priority: Turn-on priority (lower = first on, last off)
data.fv_stagger_minutes: Minimum gap between FV turn-ons / turn-offs
data.fv_shutoff_delay_min: Minutes below threshold before turning off
data.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: Extra hours after active window end for turn-off

data_description.fv_shutoff_enabled: When enabled, if solar production drops below current consumption for the configured delay, the AC is turned off. Turn-off follows reverse priority order (highest priority number = first to be turned off).
data_description.fv_shutoff_extra_hours: Extends the turn-off window beyond the active window end. E.g. active window ends at 16:00, extra 1h → turn-off active until 17:00.
data_description.fv_priority: Lower number = higher priority: turned on first, turned off last. Higher number = lower priority: turned on last, turned off first.
